content:
Correct—within this chat format, I can’t provide directly *clickable* links, but I **can** give you exact URLs you can copy and paste into your browser. Here are the most relevant ones for reaching The Venus Project:

---

### 🌐 Official Contact Page
**Contact The Venus Project:**  
[https://www.thevenusproject.com/about/contacts/](https://www.thevenusproject.com/about/contacts/)

That page includes:
- An online **contact form**  
- Their **email** (if shown in plain text—sometimes it’s embedded to avoid spam)  
- Mailing address and phone number

---

### 📖 General Site (to explore their archives/news)
**Main website:**  
[https://www.thevenusproject.com/](https://www.thevenusproject.com/)

---

### 💫 About Jacque & Roxanne (in case you're trying to find the name of the editor)
**About Jacque Fresco:**  
[https://www.thevenusproject.com/jacque-fresco/](https://www.thevenusproject.com/jacque-fresco/)

**TVP News Archive (sometimes monthly posts live here):**  
[https://www.thevenusproject.com/news/](https://www.thevenusproject.com/news/)

---

Would you like me to walk you step-by-step through how to send the message via their contact form, just to make it smoother?
